source_meta.source_document: 2.7 mm VA LCP Clavicle Plate System

systems.system_notes: Clavicle locking plate family within the DePuy Synthes trauma portfolio, including superior and anterior options.

trays.tray_notes: Official DePuy Synthes product and inventory resources describe dedicated clavicle plating instrumentation.

components.component_notes: Official DePuy Synthes materials describe the superior and superior-anterior clavicle plate family.
Official inventory materials describe compatible screw fixation for the clavicle plate system.
Official product materials describe dedicated instrumentation and drill-guide workflow for clavicle plate application.

unresolved_items.raw_text: Current official sources confirm the clavicle plate family and inventory references, but a full normalized product-code matrix has not yet been extracted in this pass.
unresolved_items.reason: A deeper sterile implant listing or broader parts-matrix pass is required for comprehensive product-code detail.
unresolved_items.source_excerpt: Current extraction remains at tray and implant-family level.
